title: Step Functions to Lambda durable functions
description: Create a Step Functions workflow to invoke Lambda durable functions synchronously and asynchronously.

introBox.headline: How it works
text: This pattern demonstrates how to integrate AWS Lambda Durable Functions into an AWS Step Functions workflow.

This pattern covers both the synchronous invocation (using default Request Response pattern) and asynchronous invocation (using the Step Function Wait for Callback with Task Token integration pattern) of the durable Lambda function.
It addresses the challenge of running long-running Lambda functions (beyond 15 minutes) within a Step Functions orchestration, using asynchronous invocation and durable checkpointing.
This pattern deploys one Step Functions and two Lambda functions along with required IAM policies.
See the GitHub repo for detailed testing instructions.

authors.name: Akshay Singhal
authors.bio: Akshay Singhal is a Principal Technical Account Manager (TAM) for AWS Enterprise Support focusing on the Security ISV (Independent Software Vendors) segment and loves everything serverless..
